series_metadata.series_title: Journal of the Board of Tax Appeals
series_metadata.series_description: This is a bound journalized record of the preceedings of the Board of Tax Appeals containing the Board's entries maintained pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Section 5703.02 (C), which entries briefly summarize the matter before the Board, the testimony or evidence presented, if any, the final determination or order of the Board regarding the appeal or application filed, and the vote of each of its Members upon every action taken by it. The journals, including those from the 1940's are referred to daily.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Permanent in Department becoming a part of the legal library, Board of Tax Appeals
